summary:
HEALING TESTIMONIES AND SUPERNATURAL MIRACLES: Brandon shares testimonies of women conceiving after his wife Diana prayed for them, anticipating that 2025 will be a significant year for growing families. Brandon discusses an upcoming move of God involving miracles, signs, and wonders, describing the emergence of glory domes. In these environments, Brandon explains, people will receive healing directly from the presence of the Lord without the need for anyone to lay hands on them, ensuring that God receives all the glory.

UPCOMING MINISTRY EVENTS AND CONFERENCES: Brandon highlights the ministry of Billy Burke, encouraging attendance at his early December meeting at Millennium Church in Tulsa, Oklahoma, and recalling a personal life-changing experience when Burke prayed for him in Pittsburgh. Brandon also outlines a February eschatology conference at Glorious Church featuring Billie Brim and Rick Renner. Brandon notes this event will focus heavily on end-times teachings, including the Rapture, the tribulation, and the Thousand-Year Reign.

FAITH THROUGH HARDSHIPS AND FINANCIAL PROVISION: Brandon encourages believers to remain steadfast during trials involving marriages, children, and careers, emphasizing the importance of speaking positive words over circumstances. Brandon recounts his past financial struggles, including the repossession of his vehicle, and shares examples of unexpected provision. Brandon details receiving a thousand dollars from a man named Tim while working as a church janitor and credits his wife Diana for providing a creative idea to sell items on eBay, Poshmark, and Facebook Marketplace to generate income.

PRAYERS FOR DELIVERANCE AND GLOBAL LEADERS: Brandon prays for physical healing, deliverance from addictions, and career advancement, comparing believers' potential success to Joseph in Egypt. Brandon states he is on the fourth day of a twenty-day prayer for Elon Musk, asking for his salvation, that Starlink be used for God's glory, and comparing Musk to Billy Graham and Esther. Brandon prays for Donald Trump's administration, asking for wisdom regarding Russia, Ukraine, France, and Emmanuel Macron, while observing two bald eagles flying overhead. Brandon also prays for Vladimir Putin, global peace, and a worldwide revival, before Diana concludes with a prayer for women seeking to conceive healthy, full-term babies free from complications, autism, or Down syndrome.
rawData: [November 19, 2024]-[A call to prayer – day 35]-[https://youtu.be/lhDhrbj_kBY]-[Hey, good morning family, how are y'all doing today? Well, praise the Lord, we're excited to be here. I have some things on my heart to pray about, but I wanted to tell you all a testimony about a lady that was believing for a baby. She wasn't able to conceive, and so after my wife prayed for her, the Lord touched her body, and they're going to have their first baby, I believe—or another baby. I don't think it's their first baby, but they're going to have another child. And so, we're excited for them. Then right after that, we got another email from somebody getting ready to have a baby; they conceived all in the same time frame. I thought, well, maybe it was the same day we prayed. Isn't that amazing that God did that and that he is growing families in the kingdom of God? Hallelujah! And so, we're excited and we rejoice with all these people that are getting ready to have babies this next year. 2025 is going to be a blessed year for some families—well, for everybody, but I'm just saying for these people who have been believing for children—so we're just excited and we just want to rejoice with you. If you have a healing testimony and the Lord's done something in your life through this channel, let us know. We're excited to see what the Lord is doing through everybody's lives, one soul at a time, one person at a time. We see it in demonstrations and manifestations of the glory; it's happening. And miracles, you know, signs and wonders in these last days, and we're expecting results. We're expecting when we pray, we give all the glory to the Lord. We give all of it because I'm telling you, nobody's even touching you, ladies and gentlemen, other than the Holy Spirit through this camera. And so it's exciting because I told you what the Lord told me. He said, 'In this last move, I'm going to do a lot of miracles and we're going to see signs and wonders.' And he said, 'Brandon, there's going to be like glory domes all over the place, and nobody's going to have to lay hands on you to receive it. You'll walk in there and the presence of the Lord will be so strong with the Shekinah glory. The weightiness of the glory will be in the atmosphere, and people will be healed because nobody's going to get the glory for it. It'll be all the glory to God. He's not going to share his glory with anybody.' And I'm excited to be a part of that because in this, we're just praying—just saying that prayer just like you would in your house—and the presence of the Lord goes in there and is delivering you. And I'm excited about that, y'all. This is exciting, and I believe this is just the beginning. The Lord told me, 'Brandon, I'm going to use this channel in an unusual way, a very unusual way, that we will see demonstrations and manifestations of the glory of God as we believe, as believers, for your unsaved loved ones, for deliverance, for healing, for all kinds of things. Whatever you may need, God has it.' And I just believe with all my heart today: today is your day for your miracle. Why don't you believe God for what seemed to be impossible to become possible? All things are possible to him that believes. Today is your day for a supernatural visitation, manifestations of the glory. I want to tell you all about Billy Burke. I'm excited about Billy Burke. I've been watching Billy Burke a lot and the healings and things that are going on in his ministry. And you all keep telling me you're going and supporting him; I'm excited that you're supporting him. I want to tell you about a meeting that's coming. He's coming to Tulsa, Oklahoma, at the first part of December. In Tulsa, if you're in the area and you want to go and experience the miracles and the demonstrations and manifestations of the glory, he's going to be at Millennium Church, I believe it is, here in Oklahoma. And so, it's exciting times. I encourage you all to support him. He goes all over the country; he has his itinerary online, and I just want everybody to support him. I saw the last meeting he had, there wasn't a lot of people there. He had it in Pittsburgh. And so, you know, I'd like for there to be standing room only for him in these meetings because I'm telling you all, I experienced the glory when I went, and I want people to really try to support this man and go see his ministry whenever he's in your area because I'm telling you, it will change your life. So if you go to Billy Burke and you're there and you see Billy Burke at the meeting and he brings you up on stage, tell him that I sent you because I think it would be cool. I think he's starting to know who I am a little bit by some of the people showing up at his meetings because he brought me up at his last service. Just say, 'Brandon sent me from the Last Days YouTube channel,' if you ever go. So that'll bless me. And I don't even personally know this man; all I know is when I went to his service and he prayed for me, my life will never be the same. And so, if the presence of the Lord would do that for me at his meeting, I believe he'll do it for you at the meeting also. And so, another thing: Sister Billie Brim is having a conference in February at Glorious Church with Rick Renner. And she is going to be teaching on the end times and the Rapture of the church—where we are in the end times. And this has never been done before with her and Rick Renner. They're going to be doing like a table talk where they're going to be talking about the end times for a whole week, everything from where we are in the tribulation, where we'll go, and the Thousand-Year Reign, all kinds of stuff. Really cool eschatology. I'm sure they'll talk about all—I mean, really, it will be full of knowledge, full of information. You know, Rick Renner is a Bible scholar and he studies out the Greek and is brilliant; he has a brilliant mind when it comes to the word of God. And I am looking forward to it. But I wanted to tell you all, you can put it on your calendar that it's going to be in February, and they're coming to the Glorious Church Fellowship. So if you're interested in going to that, I'm sure it would bless you. It would be a Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, or something like that. I don't remember exactly the dates, but I will update you again. You can either call Glorious Church or look at their website and be able to see when they're having this meeting, but I believe it's the first week of February. So I just want to encourage you all to support that and hopefully it'll bless you because I believe it's going to bless us. Aren't you excited about Diana? Yes, it's exciting times. We love hearing about eschatology and about end-time teaching, especially from Rick, and then when you put Billie together with Rick and the Greek and all that, it's like, oh my gosh, this is going to be phenomenal. So I just want to encourage you all today to believe God for big. I know people get discouraged, I know we get weary in well-doing, but I want you to hold up your head today and know that Jesus loves you even in the midst of the storms of life—even whenever it seems like all things are coming against you and the waves of life are knocking you down. I just want you to keep your head up. I've been there, and there are days that I feel like I don't want to—I'm like, 'How can I even come out and do another video today? I'm so tired.' But you know, you just keep on keeping on even when things seem to be at their worst. You know, I see all these bugs and all this stuff flying around me, I'm not used to all this, I get distracted. It's like, 'There's a bug, there's a bug!' But whenever things seem to be at their hardest, that's whenever the light comes out strongest. I believe with all my heart it's darkest before dawn. I just want to encourage you all to keep on keeping on. Don't give up whenever you're believing for your miracle. I know there's some days that seem like it's never going to happen. You may feel that way in your natural, like, 'Oh, do I have to go through another day of this?' But I'm telling you, in due season's coming. In due season's coming. You have to keep on keeping on, fighting the good fight of faith, regardless if you're having a hard time in your marriage, you may be having a hard time with your kids, or you may be having a hard time with your job. And you may think, 'Man, I can't go in there another day and serve and work at this place anymore. God, are you going to open another door for me for another great job?' The job is a big deal for a lot of people because you spend eight hours a day there, sometimes more, every single day, five days a week, sometimes six days a week, working your tail end off trying to make a living, trying to do things to supply for your families. There's men out there that are working full-time, two jobs, three jobs, who knows? And you get to the point where you get weary in well-doing, where you get to the holiday times and you're thinking, 'How am I going to buy Christmas for my kids? How am I going to buy Thanksgiving dinner for my family?' But I'm telling you, God said in his word that he would supply all your needs according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus. And regardless of your—and I always told myself whenever we didn't have much, we were down at the bottom of the barrel, thinking, 'Lord, how are we going to do this?' And the Lord always provided a way. He always takes care of his beloved, and I believe with all my heart he'll take care of you. He's no respecter of persons. But there would be times whenever we were down to our last ten cents, it seemed like we didn't have anything, and we were like, 'Oh man, what are we going to do?' Remember, Die? It was terrible, and the Lord always provided. It wasn't always the best of what we thought we needed, but we got through. And so I'm trying to encourage you all to know that God's going to take care of you. Believing for a creative idea—I know a lot of people don't want to hear this, but there's a lot of people that are struggling because we get the emails, and I know that God is a provider. God is El Elyon, the Most High. He is a Jehovah Jireh. He will provide for you, he will heal you, he will deliver you, and all you have to do is reach out in simple faith. Abraham—it says in the word—Abraham staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief. He knew in the deadness of her womb, she was old, there was no life in that womb to bring forth a new child, but the Lord saw to it to bring him forth, Isaac. And I believe with all my heart that there's Isaacs coming, not just in babies, but in every area of your life. Isaacs—there's blessings, there's increase, there's new jobs, there's multiplication, there's promotions. Whatever you may need, I believe with all my heart God has your Isaac. Does that make sense what I'm trying to say, ladies and gentlemen? I'm trying to tell you to believe God and stagger not at the promises that God said he would supply for all your needs according to riches and glory, that he would heal you by his stripes, that he would deliver you, and that with long life he would satisfy you and show you his salvation—Psalms 91—and that he would give you peace in your homes. You don't have to go home tonight and be tormented and go, 'Well, you know, we're going to go home, my wife and I are going to fight probably all night and I'll sleep in the other room, won't have anybody to be with because our marriage is just terrible.' Remember, you have what you say. The Bible says call those things that be not as though they were, and you have to speak to your circumstances and say, 'My marriage is good.' Even whenever Diana and I were having a hard time when Megan was first diagnosed, there were days, because of how much pressure it was having a special needs child, that I was like, 'Man, I don't want to do this anymore.' It wasn't because of Diana; it was because the circumstances were making—I've always loved Diana, we've had a really good friendship and a good marriage, but there's been times whenever there's been pressure from circumstances of life that really try to put pressure on the marriage and put pressure on the finances, pressure on things that you go, 'I don't want to do this anymore.' And you've got to have that inside, that bulldog on a bone, saying, 'I will keep doing this. I signed up for this, I'm going to do this. I made a covenant with her, I made a covenant with him, and we're going to walk through the valley and we're going to make this happen. We're not quitters, we're fighters, and we're doers of the word, regardless of how hard life throws these curveballs and fastballs at you.' You've got to keep on keeping on and know that we're not quitters. We have to be the army, and we have to be the backbone. And when things are thrown at us the hardest, that's whenever you keep saying the strongest, 'Nope, I'm going to keep making this marriage work. Nope, I'm going to fight and I'm going to believe for my child's healing. No, I'm going to believe for a better job, I'm going to believe God for a creative idea.' And it didn't even come through me, ladies and gentlemen. The idea to do eBay, the idea to do Poshmark, the ideas to sell things on Facebook Marketplace—that came from the Holy Spirit and my wife. So you think a lot of times, 'Well, it's going to have to come through the man.' No, listen to your wife and what she has to say. She may have a creative idea that might get you out of the hole, too. Don't always try to be the one who says, 'Well, I'm the head, I'm going to get this through.' No, it came through my sweet wife, and whenever she said it, I didn't even believe it. I'd say, 'Is this the way God wants to do this for our family?' because pride comes in as a man and you think, 'Well, I'm not going to listen to that.' And I just had to just say, 'Listen, buddy, you better shut your mouth.' You know what I'm saying? I'm just saying, there is a lot of times that the Lord will use unexpected ways, and it doesn't have to be how you think it's going to happen because you try to box God in, you try to limit God, you try to tell him, 'This is how you're going to operate in our life.' And God is exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. God is not going to operate in your peanut brain in how he's going to get it to you. It comes through—like I told you all, I had a man—I was just cleaning the floors of the church, not expecting it at all. It was a big Christmas program that we were doing at the church and I was just in there cleaning, and we didn't have any Christmas presents for the kids or anything. We wanted to get the gifts for the family and we were like, 'Man, Lord,' and we were down to nothing. And this man out of nowhere walks up to me—his name was Tim—and he walked up to me and he said, 'The Lord told me to give you this $1,000.' It would have seemed like it was a million dollars, ladies and gentlemen, for where we were. $1,000—that was like—because I only made like eight bucks an hour. So when you get $1,000 on janitor's wages, you go, 'My God.' You know, the Lord came through. And I remember sitting there when he walked away, I went outside and I called Diana and I said, 'Babe, the Lord just provided our Christmas,' and she just wept on the phone with me. We both wept because God came through. And it's not just one time he's done that. If he did it once, he'll do it again. And that's where we believe him all the time, even today for it, ladies and gentlemen. I don't always have my stuff together. I may—you may think I do, and it may seem like I do on this camera, but we believe God for stuff all the time. We're still believing him for stuff. You say, 'Well, Brandon, what are you doing with your faith right now?' I'm believing for things that if I told you what I was believing for, it would freak you out because of things the Lord has told me that we're going to have to do for this ministry. But we keep on, and we know that it is not by our might, not by my power, but by the spirit, says the Lord. Regardless of how big it is, sometimes the mountain seems so big that you can't climb it and you go, 'How in the world am I going to get up there?' other than just say, 'Lord, I trust you. You said it, and now you're going to bring it to pass. You told us to do it, now you're going to bring it to pass. I'm not going to be moved by what I see. I'm not moved by what I feel.' If you don't bring it, I'm not going to worry about it. It's your bill, Lord. I used to get so upset about it, I used to have anxiety about it, and it was bad. For a long time, I told Die, I said, 'If I could just get a couple months extra in the bank so I don't stress out about these finances all the time—about your electric, your water, your gas, and your car payment.' Because there was a time whenever they repoed our car; they came and took it, and we would sit there and just watch it go down the street. It sucks—it's just being real. And you get to that point where you get really discouraged when they come and get your broke-down Honda with 200,000 miles on it, and you're going, 'What gives?' And then you keep believing. That's what I'm trying to tell y'all. We've been there. We know what it's like to be at the bottom of the barrel and the barrel be on top of you, like Brother Hagin used to say. But God, who is rich in mercy. So I hope this encourages you today that you're not alone. You may think you're alone, you may think God's not hearing you, you may think he's abandoned us, 'We don't even have enough for some Spam and some peanut butter and jelly.' But I'm telling you, if you keep on being faithful, you keep speaking to your circumstances, if you keep calling those things that be not as though they were, you keep speaking to your marriage—'My marriage is good, my marriage is whole, my marriage is healthy'—because what you say out of your mouth is what you're going to have tomorrow. What you said out of your mouth today is what you lived yesterday. Life is a series of choices. We were talking about it even yesterday; I said, 'Isn't it amazing, it's the small decisions that make the big decision.' We're always looking for the big thing. For me, struggling with my weight, eating wrong foods, bad foods during the day—I'll pick up something and put it in my mouth, it's something so small and yet it tries to ruin me. It's something that I deal with, and you get that stress and you go, 'Man, I've got to have that piece of candy,' and I put it in my mouth and I didn't even realize I did it because it's just something that I've dealt with. And I try so hard to turn it around. I say, 'Tomorrow, the diet starts tomorrow. Tomorrow I'm going to do good.' And then you end up catching yourself with that cookie from Paisley, my little girl. She'll have a cookie and I go, 'Oh, it's gluten-free.' I just try to be real with y'all. Like I said, we all have our stuff we're going through, and none of us are perfect. We're all work in progress. But Jesus loves every single one of us where we are and he wants us to come up higher. He always—there's that gentle, still, small voice tugging at your heart. 'Brandon, you can make it, you can do this, you can make your marriage work. You can do whatever you set your mind to with the Holy Spirit.' You can achieve it. I'm telling you, whenever it's anointed by God, he puts that on you and he says, 'Hey, you can climb this mountain,' and you're thinking, 'No, I can't. I can't make it through this. You don't know how much debt I'm in. You don't know how much my boss hates me. You don't know how much my wife and I fight. You don't know how much my kids are such a pain in the rear.' It's what you're saying out of your mouth. I don't ever curse my family. sometimes you get real frustrated and you may spout off something; I'm always quick to repent. I say, 'Diana, I shouldn't have said that, I was frustrated. I shouldn't have said that. I curse those words, I call crop failure over those words.' You always try to be quick to repent and put it under the blood when you do mess up. Don't beat yourself up; you keep on keeping on. 'Well, I called my kid a pain in the butt,' or whatever. 'Lord, I thank you, Lord, Johnny is a good boy.' You just keep on keeping on. Speak into your circumstances and you will see them change. Find scripture that pertains to what you're believing for—healing, finances, a sound home. You can go through the Solomon for your marriage. Find scripture about the Song of Solomon about being in love and quote those over your wife, quote those over your husband. That's what I do over—I bless Diana all the time, bless her in her sleep, lay hands on her mind. 'Father, I thank you, Lord, that Diana is sound, that she's a good wife, she's a good mother. Thank you, Lord, for the spouse that you've given me. I bless her in the name of Jesus, that she'll always walk in health, she'll always know wealth, she'll always know peace that passes all understanding.' Bless your spouse. Speak to the circumstances; call them something good, not bad. Do you see what I'm saying? And that's what brings fruit in your life. Love never fails. Walk in love, and I know that that's what's brought me breakthroughs. And like I said, even whenever it seemed like it was impossible with the hardest days with Megan, we just kept on keeping on, didn't we, babe? And it was rough—rough days—but God brought us through and Megan's getting better and better. But we looked back ten years ago, and it was rough, really rough. I thought, 'My goodness, we're never going to make it out of this,' in the natural. But I would never speak that out of my mouth. I mean, I'm talking—I'd bite my tongue because I knew that life and death is in the power of the tongue. And I told Diana, even if the doctors say this is going to be this way, I'd always backtrack their word. Say, 'That's not going to happen to us. We're not going to live that way. We're coming out of this.' And they look at you like you're delusional, like you're on something. 'You haven't come to reality, sir.' And I say, 'No, my reality is the word of God. You may say this, but I believe what the word of God says about us.' That he said in his word that all things are possible to him who believes, regardless of what you want to say, sir. And I'm not disrespectful to them, but sometimes they come across really aggressive. 'You need to come to reality, you are living in La La Land.' And I'm not. Didn't they, babe? When they get aggressive, you get aggressive with the word. So we want to encourage you all to tell you you can make it and you just keep believing for the impossible to come to pass in your life. That's what you've got to do. So we're going to pray for you today. We want to believe for your healing, Diana's going to believe for your deliverance, for your family, for your healing, for your children. Today is your day for your breakthrough. Father, we just thank you right now in the name of Jesus for every single person who's represented here today for healings and demonstrations and manifestations of the glory. Father, I speak healing over their lives right now. I thank you, Father, that you deliver them from the top of their head to the soles of their feet, that healing flows through this camera right now. Father, whatever they need, you know what they need, and I thank you, Father, that they are delivered from addictions, from sickness and disease, from bondage—from things that they thought they would have for the rest of their life. I thank you, Father, that your burden-removing, yoke-destroying power goes through this camera right now in the name of Jesus and sets them free. I call them healed, whole, and well. We thank you, Lord, that you're the deliverer, you're the healer, there's more than enough for whatever they need. Father, we call them prosperous, we call them to have more than enough. Father, we thank you, Lord, that they have jobs and better jobs. We speak to the jobs, Father, that every single one of them would be the head and not the tail. We speak that they would be the boss, that they are the ones excelling. Father, just like you excelled Joseph in Egypt with Pharaoh, you blessed him and you made him excel above everybody. I thank you, Father, that you're the same yesterday, today, and forever, and the same God that would do that for Joseph would do that for them. And I thank you, Father, they'll be second in command, they'll be head in command. Father, I thank you, Lord, that they are not to be the tail, they're to be over and above all that they dare ask or think according to the power that worketh through them—and that's you, Holy Spirit. You've anointed their hands to prosper today. Everything they put their hands to—no matter what it is, they could be the best bush trimmer in all the world, they could have a yard company and be successful beyond anybody else. Say it out of your mouth: 'I am anointed to do whatever I feel I'm called to do.' Say it: 'I am anointed to be a bush trimmer in a way that the world is not familiar with, all for the glory of God.' That's what our pastor says; he taught us that. You say that out of your mouth: 'I am anointed to be the greatest golf player, or the greatest tax accountant, or the greatest police officer, or the greatest firefighter. I'm anointed to be a firefighter in a way that the world is not familiar with, all for the glory of God.' And in all that you do, in word and in deed, give all to the glory of God. And I'm telling you, you'll see yourself excel. Speak that out of your mouth. When you give God the glory in every area of your life—no matter what you're doing—baseball, you could be the best—'I am the greatest pool guy that the world has ever seen, all for the glory of God. I'm anointed to be a pool guy.' That's what I should say. 'I am anointed to sell cars in a way that the world is not familiar with, all for the glory of God.' So that's what you've got to say. Father, I thank you—the greatest hair person, the greatest nail person. 'I'm anointed to do nails in a way that the world is not familiar with, all for the glory of God.' You may be a plastic surgeon—I don't know—but just say it. Say it out your mouth and say it all the time. Speak it. So, Father, we thank you, Lord, that that's who they are; they're anointed to do it and we believe with them today. Now, Father, we believe for Elon Musk. Father, we call him saved, we call him delivered. We thank you, Lord, that the Starlink will be used for the glory of God. We thank you, Lord, that Elon Musk will be anointed for such a time as this, like Esther, Father, to bring forth the gospel like a Billy Graham. Father, he has a lot of resources, and we thank you, Lord, that you have a plan for Elon Musk's life. I criticized him, Lord, and you told me, 'I want you to pray for him for 20 days.' I think this is day four. I thank you, Father, that that man is getting born again and he's becoming radically saved with his influence. Father, that there will be people that come across his path that bring forth the gospel to him and that he would have ears to hear and a heart to receive what the spirit is saying. Now, Father, we take authority over the blinders, for you said Satan has come and blinded the eyes of the unbeliever. And I thank you, Father, that we call those blinders off of his eyes right now in the name of Jesus. And I speak to his eyes, that he has eyes to see what the spirit is saying, according to Ephesians. We speak to his eyes, that they're flooded with light today in Jesus' name, and that he knows the hope of his calling. We believe, Father, that Elon Musk will have visitations and manifestations of the glory and he will call you Lord and Savior. Father, we thank you, Lord, for delivering his family, for delivering his home—that he would have peace and that he would know you intimately and that you would know him. We thank you, Lord, that every single person, as we believe for Elon Musk, we're believing for our unsaved loved ones and you're bringing them to pass right now in Jesus' name. And we give you all the glory, honor, and praise for that, Father. And we thank you, Father, for healings and manifestations. We call our government well, we call our government blessed. We speak to our government, we speak to the circumstances to change, and we say in the name of Jesus, Donald Trump has a great administration. We thank you, Lord, that the persecution and all the trials that are coming against him are under his feet in Jesus' name, and that he'll rise above and lead this country back into a way that is godly again. We thank you, Father, that there's good days ahead of us, and Father, we thank you, Lord, that when the financial stuff happens, what you've showed me, Father, it will not affect us, for you always said you would provide for your beloved. When a plague comes, it does not affect us because you always protect your beloved. A thousand will fall at your side and ten thousand will fall at your left, but nothing shall come nigh us. There's a big old eagle just flew over us when I'm praying. Sorry to get distracted—that was amazing. Big old bald eagle! Father, I thank you, Lord, glory to God! Oh, there's another one, there's two! Well, praise the Lord for that, that's awesome. Big old bald eagle flying over me when I'm praying. Father, I thank you, Lord, for prophetic signs when I'm praying for Donald Trump, that a big old eagle—so cool when he shows up like that. That big old bald eagle would fly over me when I'm praying for Donald Trump. Father, I just know he has this nation. I just know he turns things and I believe with all my heart that there's good days ahead of America. And whenever the enemy's trying to work up a plan even right now, trying to do things behind our back, Father, I thank you, Lord, that you're giving Donald Trump wisdom and discernment concerning this and that he'll know how to handle Russia, he'll know how to handle Ukraine and France and what you showed me with Emmanuel Macron.
